# Profiline GM25 — Full Product Information

## Overview
The Profiline GM25 is a professional-grade 25mm dual-action orbital polisher designed and assembled in Bulgaria. It combines extreme cutting power with perfect ergonomic balance for extended professional use.

## Technical Specifications
- Model: PROFILINE GM 25
- Type: Dual Action Orbital Polisher
- Power Output: 1200W
- Voltage: 220-240V / 50Hz (EU version), 110-120V / 60Hz (US version)
- Orbits Per Minute: 2200-5800 OPM
- Speed Settings: 6-speed variable dial (1=2200, 2=2900, 3=3600, 4=4300, 5=5000, 6=5800)
- Orbital Throw: 25mm
- Weight: 2.60 kg
- Backing Plates Included: 125mm (5") and 150mm (6")
- Cable Length: 9 meters heavy-duty flexible cable
- Certifications: CE, EAC

## Key Features
- CNC-machined counterweight system for virtually zero vibration
- Rubberized grip zones for maximum control during extended use
- Progressive trigger mechanism for precise speed control
- Advanced airflow cooling system for extended operation
- Maintains pad rotation on complex curves and under heavy pressure
- Designed for 8-hour professional shifts

## What's in the Box
1. Profiline GM25 Dual Action Polisher
2. 125mm (5") Backing Plate
3. 150mm (6") Backing Plate
4. User Manual
5. Warranty Card

## Warranty
- 2-year warranty across all European markets
- Covers: Material defects, Workmanship defects
- Excludes: Carbon brushes, Velcro-backed support plates, Power cables (wear parts)

## Spare Parts
Full inventory of replacement parts available: carbon brushes, backing plates, power cords, bearings, gears, and all internal components (49 components total).

## Company
- Brand: Profiline Tools
- Headquarters: Bulgaria, European Union
- Website: https://profilinegm25.eu
- Email: contact@profilinegm25.eu
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61579498340048

## Distribution
Profiline is expanding its European distribution network and welcomes inquiries from detailing academies, wholesale distributors, and premium retail outlets.

## Tagline
"Focus on the Shiny Finish"
